content.problemStatement:
You are given NNN integers a1,a2,‚Ä¶,aNa_1, a_2, \dots, a_Na1‚Äã,a2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,aN‚Äã. Let's define functions fff and ggg:

f(x,k)=(x+a1)k+(x+a2)k+‚ãØ+(x+aN)kf(x, k) = (x + a_1)^k + (x + a_2)^k + \dots + (x + a_N)^kf(x,k)=(x+a1‚Äã)k+(x+a2‚Äã)k+‚ãØ+(x+aN‚Äã)k

g(t,k)=f(0,k)+f(1,k)+‚ãØ+f(t,k)g(t, k) = f(0, k) + f(1, k) + \dots + f(t, k)g(t,k)=f(0,k)+f(1,k)+‚ãØ+f(t,k)

You are also given integers TTT and KKK. Calculate g(T,i)g(T, i)g(T,i) modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7 for each iii between 000 and KKK inclusive.
constraints: **Subtask #2 (10 points):** ai=a1ia_i = a_1 ^ iai‚Äã=a1i‚Äã modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7 for each valid iii
**Subtask #3 (10 points):** ai=a1+i‚àí1a_i = a_1 + i - 1ai‚Äã=a1‚Äã+i‚àí1 modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7 for each valid iii
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains three space-separated integers NNN, KKK and TTT.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers a1,a2,‚Ä¶,aNa_1, a_2, \dots, a_Na1‚Äã,a2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,aN‚Äã.
content.outputFormat: Print a single line containing K+1K+1K+1 space-separated integers ‚Äî the values of g(T,0),g(T,1),‚Ä¶,g(T,K)g(T, 0), g(T, 1), \dots, g(T, K)g(T,0),g(T,1),‚Ä¶,g(T,K) modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.
